lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਘਰੁ ੬ ਕੇ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 4 raag aasaa ghar 6 ke 3 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl, Raag Aasaa, 3 Of Sixth House :

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਥਿ ਕਰਿ ਤੰਤੁ ਵਜਾਵੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਥੋਥਰ ਵਾਜੈ ਬੇਨ ॥
lines.translit: hath kar tant vajaavai jogee thothar vaajai ben |
lines.english: You may pluck the strings with your hand, O Yogi, but your playing of the harp is in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਮਤੀ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jogee har dehu matee upades |
lines.english: O Yogi, give your intellect the Teachings of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਹਮ ਆਦੇਸੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug har har eko varatai tis aagai ham aades |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord, the One Lord, is pervading throughout all the ages; I humbly bow down to Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਬੋਲਹੁ ਜੋਗੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਭੇਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramat har gun bolahu jogee ihu manooaa har rang bhen |1|
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, O Yogi, and this mind of yours shall be imbued with the Lord's Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਹਿ ਰਾਗ ਭਾਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਖੇਲੈ ਖੇਲ ॥
lines.translit: gaaveh raag bhaat bahu boleh ihu manooaa khelai khel |
lines.english: You sing in so many Ragas and harmonies, and you talk so much, but this mind of yours is only playing a game.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰ ਮਹਿ ਕਰਮ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਮੈ ਹਰਿਆ ਖੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa nagar meh karam har bovahu har jaamai hariaa khet |
lines.english: In the field of the body, plant the Lord's Name, and the Lord will sprout there, like a lush green field.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਵਹਿ ਕੂਪ ਸਿੰਚਨ ਕਉ ਬਸੁਧਾ ਉਠਿ ਬੈਲ ਗਏ ਚਰਿ ਬੇਲ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: joveh koop sinchan kau basudhaa utth bail ge char bel |2|
lines.english: You work the well and irrigate the fields, but the oxen have already left to graze in the jungle. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੂਆ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਬੈਲੁ ਮਨੁ ਜੋਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿੰਚਹੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਜੇਤੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manooaa asathir bail man jovahu har sinchahu guramat jet |3|
lines.english: O mortal, hook up your unstable mind like an ox, and irrigate your fields with the Lord's Name, through the Guru's Teachings. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਜੰਗਮ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਤੁਮਰੀ ਜੋ ਦੇਹੁ ਮਤੀ ਤਿਤੁ ਚੇਲ ॥
lines.translit: jogee jangam srisatt sabh tumaree jo dehu matee tith chel |
lines.english: The Yogis, the wandering Jangams, and all the world is Yours, O Lord. According to the wisdom which You give them, so do they follow their ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਪੇਲ ॥੪॥੯॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ke prabh antarajaamee har laavahu manooaa pel |4|9|61|
lines.english: O Lord God of servant Nanak, O Inner-knower, Searcher of hearts, please link my mind to You. ||4||9||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤ ਬਾਰ ਖਿਨੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਹਉ ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਮਾਰਉ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aavat jaat baar khin laagai hau tab lag samaarau naam |1|
lines.english: In the brief instant between coming and going, I meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਕੋ ਭਾਲੈ ਘੁੰਘਰੂ ਤਾਲਾ ਕਬ ਕੋ ਬਜਾਵੈ ਰਬਾਬੁ ॥
lines.translit: kab ko bhaalai ghungharoo taalaa kab ko bajaavai rabaab |
lines.english: How long must one search for angle bells and cymbals, and how long must one play the guitar?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਰਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਉ ਜੈਸੇ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੀਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau har bin khin pal reh na skau jaise jal bin meen mar jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Lord, I cannot live even for an instant, like the fish which dies without water. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਐਸੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: merai man aisee bhagat ban aaee |
lines.english: Such is the devotional love which has been produced in my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਲਤ ਚੁਨਤ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਚਸਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: melat chunat khin pal chasaa laagai tab lag meraa man raam gun gaavai |2|
lines.english: In the time it takes to select and assemble these musicians, a moment elapses, and my mind sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਕੋਊ ਮੇਲੈ ਪੰਚ ਸਤ ਗਾਇਣ ਕਬ ਕੋ ਰਾਗ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਠਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kab koaoo melai panch sat gaaein kab ko raag dhun utthaavai |
lines.english: How long must one tune the five strings, and assemble the seven singers, and how long will they raise their voices in song?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਕੋ ਨਾਚੈ ਪਾਵ ਪਸਾਰੈ ਕਬ ਕੋ ਹਾਥ ਪਸਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kab ko naachai paav pasaarai kab ko haath pasaarai |
lines.english: How long must one dance and stretch out one's feet, and how long must one reach out with one's hands?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥ ਪਾਵ ਪਸਾਰਤ ਬਿਲਮੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਸਮੑਾਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: haath paav pasaarat bilam til laagai tab lag meraa man raam samaarai |3|
lines.english: Stretching out one's hands and feet, there is a moment's delay; and then, my mind meditates on the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਕੋਊ ਲੋਗਨ ਕਉ ਪਤੀਆਵੈ ਲੋਕਿ ਪਤੀਣੈ ਨਾ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kab koaoo logan kau pateeaavai lok pateenai naa pat hoe |
lines.english: How long must one satisfy the people, in order to obtain honor?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਦ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਤਾ ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਰੇ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har hiradai sad dhiaavahu taa jai jai kare sabh koe |4|10|62|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, meditate forever in your heart on the Lord, and then everyone will congratulate you. ||4||10||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਰਤਨੁ ਬਲਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: giaan ratan baliaa ghatt chaanan agiaan andheraa jaae |1|
lines.english: With the sparkling jewel of spiritual wisdom, the heart is illumined, and ignorance is dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat mileeai har saadhoo mil sangat har gun gaae |
lines.english: Join the Sat Sangat, the Lord's True Congregation; joining the Company of the Holy, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਨਾਚਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jan naachahu har har dhiaae |
lines.english: O humble servant of the Lord, let your dancing be meditation on the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਹਮ ਜਨ ਕੇ ਧੋਵਹ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aise sant mileh mere bhaaee ham jan ke dhovah paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If only I cold meet such Saints, O my Siblings of Destiny; I would wash the feet of such servants. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu man mere anadin har liv laae |
lines.english: Meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O my mind; night and day, center your consciousness on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛਹੁ ਸੋਈ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo ichhahu soee fal paavahu fir bhookh na laagai aae |2|
lines.english: You shall have the fruits of your desires, and you shall never feel hunger again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹਰਿ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਬੋਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape har aparanpar karataa har aape bol bulaae |
lines.english: The Infinite Lord Himself is the Creator; the Lord Himself speaks, and causes us to speak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਸੰਤ ਭਲੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਜਿਨੑ ਕੀ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਥਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: seee sant bhale tudh bhaaveh jina kee pat paaveh thaae |3|
lines.english: The Saints are good, who are pleasing to Your Will; their honor is approved by You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਰਾਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਜਿਉ ਆਖੈ ਤਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak aakh na raajai har gun jiau aakhai tiau sukh paae |
lines.english: Nanak is not satisfied by chanting the Lord's Glorious Praises; the more he chants them, the more he is at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਦੀਏ ਹਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਵਣਜਿ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੬੩॥
lines.translit: bhagat bhanddaar dee har apune gun gaahak vanaj lai jaae |4|11|63|
lines.english: The Lord Himself has bestowed the treasure of devotional love; His customers purchase virtues, and carry them home. ||4||11||63||
